texts.full_text: City Council seat. Councillor Tito Jackson, a former aide to Gov. Deval Patrick who won the seat in a 2011 special election, is running for reelection. Crawford, who opened up a campaign account with the state Office of Campaign and Political Finance last week and placed $5,000 into it, was scheduled to launchhis write-in bid day at noon outside Town Hall. He has been critical in subsequent years on social media about Johnson's record as mayor. "I'm running because I believe we have a change," Jackson informed the Reporter yesterday morning while hiking his horse near Lincoln Grove Zoo."I've seen Councilors come and go, but they don't address matters that matter to me." Smith has been active in many civic organizations outside boston. He is recognized for organising demonstrations against police violence after multiple high-profile arrests involving Worcester Police Department members. "I'm not a lawyer," Crawford replied with pride."I've always run before and I certainly won't again, but this year it's important to me because the women deserve more." texts.full_text: one of Tamil cinema iconic pair. The music composed by Ilaiyaraaja, a maestro in Indian classical films also played an important role giving life to this light-hearted movie. The film was able appeal not just for its humor but as well because it subtly depicted common human emotions and how misunderstandings can be resolved through patience understanding of one another. The success off the remake versions (Biwi No 1 in Hindi) speaks volumes about script's timelessness, though no remakes were ever made into Tamil like most successful originals. But Sathi Leelavathy is definitely a gem from that era which will always have its place among all-time classic films not only for Tamilians but film lovers across globe. Balu Mahendran has often been praised as one of India's best directors and writers, this movie further solidifies his reputation with such an engaging narrative. texts.full_text: 7.5-MHz linear-array transducer with color and power Doppler capability was used to scan the scrotum. Patients were seen between July 1998 and September 1999. Diagnoses were verified by radiology or surgery. Sensitivity and specificity with 95% confidence intervals were calculated. The EP ultrasound examinations agreed with confirmatory studies for 35 of 36 patients, resulting in a sensitivity of 95% (95% CI = 0.78 to 0.99) and a specificity of 94% (95% CI = 0.72 to 0.99).
